caption.text:
Kenneth Herrera 
“He trained and inspired until the very end.”

I began lifting at 10 years old. 
I played basketball and I always wanted to be stronger since I played with people 3-5 years older than me, so o began working out.  I took training more seriously when I joined the military. 

I have trained on my own as well as trained with a group of guys. I enjoy training alone but when I go heavy it’s good to have that group so that you can motivate each other. I also trained with a trainer and learned a lot about training for bodybuilding as well as powerlifting.  

Fitness has influenced me because I was able to motivate and help save people’s lives by bringing them to the gym. 
I would like to improve my strength and get back to competing at a higher lever again. My goal is to bench 500 lbs in competition. 

My go to supps are as followed pre workout is Synedrex pre contest with CGP, TAG and 1 scoop of Glycoload. Intra 1 scoop of Glycoload and 1.5 scoop of Tripep.  Post 2 scoop of MuscLean. 
To maintain a healthy life style I use Metatest, Vitamin C, Elderberry, Zinc and Magnesium.

The one life lesson I live by everyday is to treat others with respect.  Also, have knowledge that mental health comes in all shapes and sizes. 

I’m thankful for my family and friends as well as my sponsors for allowing me to have a platform where I can continue to motivate others to strive for greatness.

Spotlight #athlete #metabolic #nutrition #letsgo

caption.text: Do what you love and make sure to make it count. Light 315 on the bench for reps. It’s time to step it up a notch and get ready to step on the platform again. Watch me work and stay tuned for this transformation. All glory to god and those around me. #ﬁtnessmotivation #bigbench #godfearingman #therapy

caption.text:
We are born to succeed as long as we have faith in our abilities. I proudly walk with god and give 100 percent in everything that I do. Those that train with me I make sure that they give it their all. This is my form of therapy, this is how I fight my demons. Workout was powered by @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off. 
#powerlifting #calesthenics #walkinfaith #fyp #viralreels

caption.text:
Did two workouts today, legs in the morning and shoulders at night. Didn’t hit 275 again on the standing military press but finished with 245. First week of real training in the last 3 weeks and I’m slowly getting back to it. Workout was powered by @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off your entire order. 
#training #powerlifter #grownmanshit #armystrong

caption.text: I know no limits when it comes to this. I go above 100 percent on everything that I do. I don’t make excuses I just show up and show out. Right leg is no way near at 100 percent but that’s not going to stop me. I’m a few weeks with god leading me I will make this look easy once again. I will defend my national title and I will beat my numbers from last year. #powerlifter #fitness #noweaponformedagainstmeshallprosper

caption.text:
Week 1 of doing a real leg workout since the shooting. After math of the shooting was a torn hamstring and a small injury to my quad. I did my own rehab and I’m feeling like I’m back to 80 percent. Now it’s time to work on depth and training smarter. I also did single leg press and regular leg press. Now it’s time to jump on a program and get ready for nationals. 
#training #powerlifting #motivation #noexcuses #follow

caption.text:
Road to 275 is looking good. I have one more week or two max before I can fully train at 100 percent. Goal is over 1700 total come June. Being shot in the leg slowed me down a bit. But I have the will power and determination to shake things up. Watch me put on for my team and walk away a 2x national champion. 
#fitness #training #hardwork #powerlifter #follow

caption.text: No excuses just hard work. 515 on the trap bar deadlift. Few weeks out of nationals and I’m bringing my best. I’m locked in and focused on bringing my best. caption.text:

#powerlifting #training #makeitcount #allglorytogod

caption.text:
Top set today was 440. Body feels great and current fasted weight was 249.5. It’s time to slowly come back up to 265-270 and shake things up for nationals. Workout powered by @metabolicnutrition gym @epic_windsorlocks coaching by @gaglionestrength 
#powerlifter #bigbench #training #dothework

caption.text:
Battle tested in multiple federations and came home with the gold and a state records. I’m starting to feel a more and more like myself after the previous surgery. Trying new exercises and focusing more on my technique versus raw strength. Weight is coming back up and I finally have an appetite. God is good and I can’t wait to defend my National tittle. 
#glorytogod #faith #dothework

caption.text:
One of the last workouts @lafitness.springfield before the remodel. Gym will be opening in a few days. So stay tuned for what we have coming for you guys. Workout was powered by the best @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off your entire order. 
#fitness #backday #fitnessjourney #training

caption.text: Had a blast while serving my country. Had to cut it short after 15 years because of my medical condition. Today I would have hit another year of service but god had other plans. #soldier #army #veteran

caption.text:
It’s time to turn up on this road to nationals. Stay tuned for some consistent content and motivation. Remember to silence the noise and do this for you. No matter what you are going through in life you can still do this for you. Just showing up is a good start. The rest will fall into place. 
#motivation #powerlifter #bodybuilding #health #fitness

caption.text: Make every workout count and never settle for less. Chest and shoulder day was a success. Body feels good and I’m slowly getting adjusted to this new weight. The road to 500 is right around the corner. But you can bet that I will hit it in comp. #powerlifter #motivation #tranining #mentalhealth #follow

caption.text:
In order to grow you must eat and train with volume. Every workout was 5-7 sets. Supplements by @metabolicnutrition use coke Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off your entire order. Also make sure to grab our Valentine’s Day shirt. Wraps by the @tuffwraps use coke ken10 at checkout to save 10 percent off your entire order. Food by my guys @longhornsteaks 
#food #training #powerlifter #bodybuildingmotivation #follow

caption.text:
Big back equals bigger bench. Don’t skip your pull-ups and get it done. If you can’t do body weighted ones then use some bands or an assisted machine. 
#bigback #training #viralvídeo #pullups #calisthenics

caption.text: First meet since my Afib ablation. 4 month of not training constantly or heavy. But I had a goal in mind of breaking the military state record and using this as a tune up for nationals.  Total was a little over 1600. Strict curl debut and learning everything the same day was 165 pounds. As you see I still had enough in the tank to lift heavier. So goal is to crack the 1800 pounds mark and win nationals again. Wraps ny @tuffwraps use code Ken10 to save 10%. Supplements by @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 to save 20% #powerliftingmotivation #viral #fitness #follow

Slowly getting my size and strength back after 4 month post surgery. Gym @epic_windsorlocks supplements by @metabolicnutrition use coke Ken20 at checkout to save 20% off. Sweat belt and cream by @steelfitusa use coke kenneth10 at checkout to save 10% off your entire order. Belt made by my guys @anc_boston @cardilloweightbelts coaching by @gaglionestrength

caption.text: Make every rep count and put in that pain. 3 month sidelined after my heart procedure brought a hunger to me like no other. Yes I’ve won in multiple federations. Yes I set multiple state records in multiple federations. Yes people will down play the hard work that I put in, but I’m all gas no breaks. Starting weight was 245. Now stay tuned for the next 30 days and see how I’m going to make this physique look small.  #motivatedbygod #hardwork #newchapter #worrior #follow

caption.text:
Fasted session powered by @metabolicnutrition use promo code Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off your entire order. Everything was 3 sets of 12-25 reps followed by 20 jumping jacks, power jumps and high knees in between sets. Rest was 30-45 sec per set. Cardio was 3 sets of walking at 3.0 speed then running at 7.5 for 1 min using the @trainingmask then 1 min walk at 3.3 then running for 1 minute at 8.5 for another min.

Workout is powered by @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 to save 20 percent. caption.text: Chest workout powered by @metabolicnutrition belt by my guys @anc_boston @cardilloweightbelts wraps by @tuffwraps coaching by @gaglionestrength every workout was 3-5 sets. With 1-2 warmup sets. With cardio and workout time I was in and out in 65 min. Post Afib ablation I’m starting to feel more comfortable and confident with each workout. Now it’s time to slowly lock back in and aim for that 500 pound bench in comp. #fitness #afib #afibablation #postsurgeryrecovery #bench #godfirst #mentality #powerlifter #athlete #training #pov

caption.text:
Quick chest, shoulders and abs workout. 3-5 sets and 30-45 sec rest per giant set. In and out in 50 min and that’s with the stretching before the workout began. Workout powered by @metabolicnutrition use code Ken20 at checkout to save 20 percent off your entire order. Sweat cream by @steelfitusa  use code keenerh10 to save 10 percent off your entire order. Straps by @tuffwraps use code Ken10 to save 10 percent off your entire order.
